hero_subtitle: SFTY helps leadership teams unify fragmented compliance workflows into one audit-ready system that enhances risk oversight and operational clarity across digital asset compliance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive visibility fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain a clear operating view when compliance processes remain fragmented and manual. This creates blind spots that slow decision-making and weaken enterprise-wide operational risk management for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance workflows, case management, provider outputs, and audit evidence into a unified control layer that delivers clear risk visibility and operational transparency for executive decision-making.
workflow_title: From provider signals to operational risk view
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs, regulatory updates and case decisions into a clear operational workflow supporting executive risk visibility and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than monitoring. Clear operational control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that connects compliance workflows, decision evidence and audit-ready reporting for clearer operational risk management.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leaders with an integrated compliance layer that preserves audit-ready evidence and supports bank due diligence within enterprise deployment controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive oversight of operational risk
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows reduce operational risk exposure
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports bank due diligence reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider outputs into executive dashboards
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance overview that reduces operational risk and strengthens auditability across digital asset compliance workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY improve compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, decisions, regulatory updates and reports to streamline manual workflows and improve visibility across compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, evidence packages and case history to support audit readiness and provide clear traceability of compliance actions and policy changes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works as a compliance control layer above providers, integrating outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into a structured, auditable compliance workflow that supports operational and executive risk management.
final_title: Bring executive risk oversight into one view
final_description: Review how SFTY structures operational risk workflows into audit-ready cases, evidence and compliance decisions for leadership teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
